heading: Findings and issuance of orders
label: 4805 Findings and issuance of orders
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1986section 1631 of Pub. L. 99–198section 4801 of this title

children.heading: Necessary findings
children.label: a Necessary findings
children.text: After notice and opportunity for public comment have been provided in accordance with , the Secretary shall issue and publish an order if the Secretary finds, and sets forth in such order, that the issuance of such order and all terms and conditions thereof will assist in carrying out this chapter.section 4804 of this title

children.heading: Number of orders in effect at a time
children.label: b Number of orders in effect at a time
children.text: Not more than one order may be in effect at a time.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: An order shall become effective on a date that is not more than 90 days following the publication of such order.

children.heading: Terms and conditions
children.label: d Terms and conditions
children.text: An order shall contain such terms and conditions as are required in sections 4806 through 4809 of this title and, except as provided in , no others.section 4810 of this title
